message: Uninitialized return value (R0 not set on all paths)
notes: cause: The verifier reached the end of the program (or a function) on a control-flow path that did not assign R0, the BPF return-value register. Every return path must produce an explicit value — falling off the end is not allowed.

0: R1=ctx() R10=fp0
; match action { Drop => 0, Pass => return }
1: (15) if r2 == 0x0 goto pc+3
2: (b7) r0 = 0
3: (95) exit
4: (95) exit
R0 !read_ok
suggest: Return an explicit i32 action or value on every control-flow path. In .hzn, use `return` with a value (or an exhaustive `match` that yields one) at the end of every branch.
